title: thymus drabiscensis
intro: Thymus drabiscensis, also known as the Corsican thyme or alpine thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Corsica and Sardinia. This herb has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Thymus drabiscensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Thymus drabiscensis can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications such as salves and creams.
